$comment: Task #693 — Public roadmap rendered on /roadmap. Items are grouped by `column` (now | next | later). `status` drives a small badge on the card (in_progress | planned | research | shipping_soon). ETAs are intentionally fuzzy quarter strings — the page header reminds visitors that this is illustrative, not a contractual commitment. Edit this file (and bump `version` when shipping changes) — there is no admin UI.

items.title: Per-signal precision / recall panel
items.description: Show how often each detector fires correctly, drawn from the holdout corpus.

items.title: Score confidence interval
items.description: Surface a ± band on the composite score so borderline reports are obvious at a glance.

items.title: Duplicate report finder
items.description: Cluster near-identical submissions across the public corpus to flag copy-paste campaigns.

items.title: Per-CWE false-positive-rate dashboard
items.description: Break down false-positive rates by CWE family so calibrators can spot weak spots.

items.title: Signal correlation matrix
items.description: Heatmap of which detectors tend to fire together — useful for picking non-redundant signal sets.

items.title: Bring-your-own fixture battery
items.description: Upload your own labelled corpus and re-run the scorer against it for site-specific calibration.

items.title: Embeddable iframe results widget
items.description: Drop a one-line iframe into Jira / advisory systems to show the score next to a report.

items.title: Browser extension for bounty platforms
items.description: Inline scores on HackerOne / Bugcrowd inboxes so triagers see slop before clicking through.

items.title: Rust SDK
items.description: First-class Rust client to complement the existing TypeScript and Python SDKs.

items.title: Webhook delivery system
items.description: Push scored results to subscribed endpoints with HMAC signatures and retries.

items.title: Self-hosted deployment guide
items.description: Reference Docker compose + air-gapped install path for teams that can't ship reports off-prem.

items.title: Jira integration recipe
items.description: Reference automation that scores newly-filed Jira issues and posts the badge as a comment.
